caption: The video begins with a wide shot of an empty indoor basketball court, showcasing its polished wooden floor, blue-painted walls, and a basketball hoop mounted on the wall. The camera then transitions to a man walking into the frame from the right side. He is wearing a sleeveless pink top and black shorts, and he appears to be speaking or gesturing towards the camera as he moves across the court. The setting suggests that he might be preparing for a basketball session or giving some form of instruction related to the sport. The environment is well-lit, indicating that it is likely daytime or the gym is well-illuminated by artificial lighting.
